prompt: Create a new React Native app called ShopApp — it's an e-commerce app for browsing and buying products. Use bare RN (not Expo). Scaffold auth, products, and cart.

assertions.description: Checks latest React Native version before running CLI command (npm view react-native version)
Uses npx react-native@latest init with TypeScript template
Installs @react-navigation/native, zustand, @tanstack/react-query, axios, react-hook-form, zod, react-native-mmkv
Includes pod install step for iOS
Scaffolds all three features: auth, products, and cart under src/features/
